title: adenostyles nardosmia
intro: Adenostyles nardosmia, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Adenostyles nardosmia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and promote digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
